UpdateSecurityGroupRule.sgVersion: Security group version number, used for optimistic locking control
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.sourceIp: Inbound rule IP, mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.sourceGroupId: Inbound rule security group ID, mutually exclusive with sourceIp
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.destIp: Outbound rule IP, mutually exclusive with destGroupId
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.destGroupId: Outbound rule security group ID, mutually exclusive with destIp
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.protocol: Protocol type, conversion from tcp/udp to icmp is not currently supported
